proofPoints.headline: Demos of all social platforms
proofPoints.description: A compact showcase of what Europe's social entrepreneurs are creating right now. Learning from one another's products, approaches, and experiments — in real time.

proofPoints.headline: Keynotes
proofPoints.description: Focused perspectives from people shaping the field. Short, sharp sessions that inform the work without dominating it.

proofPoints.headline: Overcoming shared challenges
proofPoints.description: Focused working groups tackling issues no entrepreneurs should navigate alone — from governance to growth to trust and safety. A space to bring problems, surface constraints, and build solutions together.

proofPoints.headline: Prototyping new Design principles
proofPoints.description: Hands-on prototyping of the set of design principles needed to build a new direction for social platforms.

proofPoints.headline: Board & Mentor Programme
proofPoints.description: A structured programme to place experienced pioneers, investors and strategic thinkers on the boards of social platform teams.

proofPoints.headline: Crafting Sessions — How To
proofPoints.description: Hands-on sessions that break down practical methods and approaches. Clear, usable guidance on the "how" behind building and scaling social platforms.

proofPoints.headline: Product design sessions
proofPoints.description: Hands-on sessions where teams co-design features, flows, and architectures. Practical, collaborative work that leads to prototypes, decisions, and momentum.

proofPoints.headline: Designing for the Big Shift Day
proofPoints.description: Designing for a dedicated day led by the industry inviting people across Europe to switch to European built social platforms. An industry-led moment to help users make the shift together.

proofPoints.headline: Public Exposure
proofPoints.description: A coordinated moment to share with all European media the platforms, and progress emerging from the industry. Designed to build awareness and readiness ahead of the Big Shift Day.

proofPoints.headline: Best of Rebuild, Replay
proofPoints.description: A curated look at the most important tools and breakthroughs from the Rebuild initiative. A way to capture what worked — and make it usable for the wider community.

proofPoints.headline: Founding Assembly for the Next Decade to Come
proofPoints.description: A gathering to set the shared principles, priorities, and structures that will guide the ecosystem forward. The starting point for long-term collaboration and commitment.

proofPoints.headline: Sunsetting Rebuild
proofPoints.description: A clear and intentional close to the one-year catalyst initiative. Releasing Rebuild so the ecosystem can continue under its own momentum and new leadership.
